top3.sql:
SELECT 
    hd_dep_count AS household_size,
    ib_upper_bound AS income_bracket,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM store_sales
JOIN customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
JOIN household_demographics ON c_current_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk
JOIN income_band ON hd_income_band_sk = ib_income_band_sk
JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE d_year = 2001
GROUP BY hd_dep_count, ib_upper_bound
ORDER BY hd_dep_count, ib_upper_bound
LIMIT 100

    hd_dep_count AS household_size,
    ib_upper_bound AS income_bracket,

FROM store_sales
JOIN customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
JOIN household_demographics ON c_current_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk
JOIN income_band ON hd_income_band_sk = ib_income_band_sk
JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk

GROUP BY hd_dep_count, ib_upper_bound
